custom_css: aside .btn-pulse{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#00a859,#fbdf07)!important;color:#000!important;border-radius:12px!important;font-weight:900!important;text-transform:uppercase!important;font-style:italic!important;box-shadow:0 4px 15px rgba(0,168,89,0.4)!important;border:2px solid #fff!important;animation:pulse-futebol 1.8s infinite!important}@keyframes pulse-futebol{0%{transform:scale(1)}50%{transform:scale(1.05);box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(251,223,7,0.6)!important}100%{transform:scale(1)}}.title-3d{font-weight:900!important;font-style:italic!important;text-transform:uppercase!important;color:#fff!important;text-shadow:0 1px 0 #0056b3,0 2px 0 #004494,0 3px 0 #003375,0 4px 0 #002256,0 5px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.5)!important;position:relative!important;display:inline-block!important}.title-3d::after{content:'⚽'!important;position:absolute!important;right:-35px!important;top:50%!important;transform:translateY(-50%)!important;font-size:24px!important;animation:gira-bola 5s linear infinite!important}@keyframes gira-bola{to{transform:translateY(-50%)rotate(360deg)}}#streak-input{background-color:#111!important;border:1px solid #fbdf07!important;border-radius:12px!important;color:#fff!important}.item-card{background-color:#f0fdf4!important;border-radius:12px!important;border:2px solid transparent!important}.item-card.selected-card{border-color:#00a859!important;box-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(0,168,89,0.5)!important}.tab-btn{font-weight:800!important;text-transform:uppercase!important;color:#666!important}.tab-btn.active{color:#00a859!important}.tab-btn.active::after{background-color:#fbdf07!important;height:4px!important;border-radius:2px!important}#streak-count{text-shadow:0 0 15px rgba(255,255,255,0.2)!important}
